{{Quote|On my pad, half a sure thing's better than twice o' nothin'.|Gunner Groth|<ref name="Dark Force Rising">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref>}}
'''Gunner Groth''', alias '''Dengar Roth''', was a low-grade [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

==Biography==
Though more suited to guarding minor [[Crime lord/Legends|crime bosses]] or tracking down debtors, Groth sought grander quarry, the criminals on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Locate and Detain List]]. He carried an identification naming him as [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], hoping to use that hunter's notoriety to scare his targets and to obtain higher bounties from Imperials.<ref name="The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>

Groth managed to locate [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] on the planet [[Rishi/Legends|Rishi]]. Thinking she'd be easy prey, and that she could lead him to [[Talon Karrde]]'s entire organization, he lured Jade into a trap, [[Death/Legends|killing]] an [[Gunner Groth's decoy|unfortunate bystander]] to create the illusion of a clumsy, amateur ambush. Unfortunately for him, Jade was able to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to turn the tables on him, killing him.<ref name="The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook" /><ref name="Dark Force Rising" />

His body was not discovered for several hours.<ref name="The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook" />
